sourceRef.citation: Annual Methodological Archive Research Review et al. 2026

statement.en: Phytochemical Screening of Selected Cholistani Plants and Their Biological Activities by In-Vitro Assays

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint/provisional research document (dated 2026, future date; labeled 'Annual Methodological Archive Research Review'). Phytochemical screening results are empirically testable but not yet peer-reviewed or validated. The biological activity claims require experimental replication. Status is provisional pending validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 砂漠の植物から滲み出る秘密の和は、死を遠ざける力に変わる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 砂漠の知恵は三つの核から放たれ、中心で一つの命に統(あつ)まる。
